subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Praise be unto God - thou hast been mentioned by the Most Exalted Pen and remembered in the Most Holy and Most Sacred Court. Take thou the chalice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله لله الحمد ذکرت از قلم اعلی جاری و در ساحت امنع اقدس مذکور خذ کاس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
